title: Instagram Profile Scraper
description: Discovers and scrapes Instagram influencer profiles by category and location.

mode.title: Run Mode
mode.description: full = discover usernames then scrape them; discovery_only = only find usernames; scrape_profiles = scrape the profileUsernames list directly.

instagramUsername.title: Instagram Username
instagramUsername.description: Instagram account username used to log in. Required for scraping.

instagramPassword.title: Instagram Password
instagramPassword.description: Instagram account password. Stored securely as a secret.

categories.title: Categories
categories.description: Content categories to discover (fashion, beauty, fitness, food, travel, tech, etc.).

locations.title: Locations
locations.description: Cities or regions to search within.

profileUsernames.title: Profile Usernames (scrape_profiles mode)
profileUsernames.description: List of Instagram usernames to scrape directly. Used when mode = scrape_profiles.

maxProfiles.title: Max Profiles to Scrape
maxProfiles.description: Maximum number of profiles to scrape (0 = unlimited).

minFollowers.title: Minimum Followers Filter
minFollowers.description: Skip profiles with fewer followers than this value (0 = no filter).

downloadThumbnails.title: Download Thumbnails to Key-Value Store
downloadThumbnails.description: If enabled, profile pictures and content thumbnails are stored in the actor's Key-Value store.

maxThumbnailsPerProfile.title: Max Content Thumbnails Per Profile
maxThumbnailsPerProfile.description: Number of content post thumbnails to download per profile.

googleApiKey.title: Google Custom Search API Key (optional)
googleApiKey.description: Google API key for Custom Search. If not set, DuckDuckGo is used as fallback.

googleSearchEngineId.title: Google Search Engine ID (optional)
googleSearchEngineId.description: Google Custom Search Engine ID (cx). Required only if googleApiKey is set.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Apify proxy settings. Residential proxies recommended for Instagram.
